description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with multiple levels and a mix of materials, including dark and light exterior walls, wood paneling, and large glass windows. The property is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs, and includes a spacious driveway leading to a garage. The backyard area is equipped with a wooden deck and a swimming pool, providing ample outdoor living space. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and open terraces, with a clear emphasis on contemporary architectural elements. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, maximizing natural light and views. The overall layout is open and inviting, with distinct zones for living, recreation, and parking.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood accents, landscaped greenery, and a backyard pool. The design features clean lines, open terraces, and a spacious driveway with a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped trees in front of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden deck, swimming pool, and backyard greenery, with the garage visible to the right.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, dense tree coverage, and the rear deck area, with the driveway extending to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, side entrance, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
